server.name: indexer
server.description: APTL Indexer MCP Server - Raw Elasticsearch DSL queries against the Wazuh Indexer and detection rule management via the Wazuh Manager API.

query.description: Run raw Elasticsearch DSL queries against the Wazuh Indexer. Supports any valid ES query DSL. Override the index pattern via params.index. Examples: {"body": {"query": {"bool": {"must": [{"match": {"rule.id": "302010"}}]}}, "size": 5}}

create_rule.description: Create or update custom Wazuh detection rules by writing to aptl_purple_loop.xml via the Manager API (overwrite=true). This file is included AFTER webapp_rules.xml so child rules can reference 302xxx via <if_sid>. Body should be raw XML rule content.

restart_manager.description: Restart the Wazuh Manager so freshly-uploaded rules take effect. Returns once the restart command is accepted; the manager will be temporarily unavailable for ~30-90s as daemons cycle. No body required.

get_rule_file.description: Fetch the raw XML content of a Wazuh rule file. Example: {"params": {"filename": "local_rules.xml"}}
